key.name: tts-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to read the selected text aloud

key.name: voice-mode
key.description: Voice generation mode: clone (ref audio), design (instruct text), or auto

key.name: ref-audio-path
key.description: Path to the reference audio file for voice cloning

key.name: ref-text
key.description: Transcription of the reference audio (leave empty for auto-transcription via Whisper)

key.name: instruct-text
key.description: Text description for voice design mode (e.g. "male, British accent, low pitch")

key.name: language
key.description: Language code for TTS generation. Use 'auto' to detect automatically.

key.name: num-step
key.description: Number of inference steps. Lower = faster, higher = better quality. Range: 4-64.

key.name: speed
key.description: Speed factor. 1.0 = normal, greater than 1 = faster, less than 1 = slower. Ignored if duration is set.

key.name: duration
key.description: Fixed duration in seconds. Set to 0 to use speed instead.

key.name: preprocess-prompt
key.description: Apply silence removal and trimming to reference audio, add punctuation to reference text.

key.name: postprocess-output
key.description: Remove long silences from generated audio.

key.name: python-bin
key.description: Path to the Python binary with OmniVoice installed (virtualenv). Replace [USER] with your username.
